creator: rafal.rabczuk@tradik.com
text:
Created attachment 185234
Log file for build.

While building a mysql57-client I am getting this error:

pkg-static: openldap-client-2.4.45 conflicts with openldap-sasl-client-2.4.45 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/ldapadd


I found related BUG in here: 
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=193349


and approved revision:
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D11667
